summary: Script is well-written (proper error handling, type hints, regex logic). Workflow uses pinned actions & minimal permissions correctly. CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Workflow hardcodes fixture/rules.json & fixture/files.txt paths that don't exist—will fail immediately. Task requires fixture files & test harness to create them before act runs. (2) Task explicitly requires act-result.txt artifact from running tests through act; not provided. (3) Task requires "all tests must run through act" with assertions on LABELS_BEGIN/LABELS_END output—not shown. Deliverable is ~50% complete: only source script provided, no fixtures, no test harness, no act results. Script alone would score 4/5, but missing test infrastructure makes this unshippable.
